tasks.title: Initialize Next.js project
tasks.description: Create Next.js 15 app with TypeScript, Tailwind, App Router, src/ directory using create-next-app CLI
tasks.complexityReason: Single CLI command to scaffold project; no custom logic
tasks.verify: npm run dev starts on localhost:3000 without errors; page renders default Next.js welcome

tasks.title: Install core dependencies
tasks.description: Install runtime dependencies: deepagents, @langchain/openai, @langchain/core, zod, lucide-react, sonner
tasks.complexityReason: Single npm install command; no code changes
tasks.verify: npm ls deepagents @langchain/openai lucide-react sonner shows all installed, no peer dep errors

tasks.title: Initialize shadcn/ui
tasks.description: Run shadcn init with Zinc theme and CSS variables, then add all required UI primitives (button, textarea, select, scroll-area, alert-dialog, sheet, dropdown-menu, separator, tooltip, sonner)
tasks.complexityReason: CLI commands to scaffold shadcn config and components; no custom logic
tasks.verify: src/components/ui/button.tsx exists; import { Button } in page.tsx renders a button with correct styling

tasks.title: Environment configuration
tasks.description: Create .env.local with OPENROUTER_API_KEY and DEFAULT_MODEL. Create typed env accessor in src/config/env.ts that reads and validates these values. Ensure .env.local is in .gitignore.
tasks.complexityReason: Two small files with simple env variable reading and validation; no business logic
tasks.verify: Import env config in a test file; values are accessible and typed

tasks.title: Design tokens and global styles
tasks.description: Update globals.css with shadcn theme variables (light + dark), Tailwind directives, and typing-dot keyframes animation. Add Inter font via next/font/google in layout.tsx.
tasks.complexityReason: CSS variable definitions and font configuration; single file changes with no logic
tasks.verify: Page renders with Inter font; dark mode toggle via class='dark' on html changes theme colors

tasks.title: Constants file
tasks.description: Create constants file exporting MODEL_LIST array of available model strings and DEFAULT_MODEL fallback string
tasks.complexityReason: Single file with hardcoded constant arrays; no logic
tasks.verify: File imports cleanly; MODEL_LIST has at least 3 entries

tasks.title: Shared types
tasks.description: Define and export Session (id, title, createdAt) and Message (id, role, content, model?, timestamp) interfaces, plus API request/response types (ChatRequest, ChatResponse, etc.)
tasks.complexityReason: Single file with TypeScript interface definitions; no logic
tasks.verify: Types import without error in a scratch file

tasks.title: OpenRouter LLM config
tasks.description: Export a createLLM(model?) function that returns a ChatOpenAI instance configured with OpenRouter baseURL, API key from env, modelName defaulting to DEFAULT_MODEL, temperature 0.7, maxTokens 4096
tasks.complexityReason: Requires correct integration with LangChain ChatOpenAI and OpenRouter API configuration; must handle env vars and model defaults
tasks.verify: Import createLLM() in a test script; call .invoke('Hello') and receive a string response from OpenRouter

tasks.title: System prompt
tasks.description: Write a general-purpose assistant system prompt stored as a const string in agent.ts. Short: identity, capabilities, tone (helpful, concise).
tasks.complexityReason: Single const string definition; no code logic
tasks.verify: Prompt is a non-empty string; reads naturally as an assistant introduction

tasks.title: DeepAgent setup with tools
tasks.description: Export createAgent(model?) and invokeAgent(agent, messages) functions. Creates a DeepAgent instance with OpenRouter LLM, system prompt, and empty tools array. Converts internal Message[] to LangChain format for invocation.
tasks.complexityReason: Multi-system integration: wiring DeepAgent framework with LangChain LLM, message format conversion, and conversation history handling
tasks.verify: Import and call createAgent() then invoke with a test message; agent returns a coherent response

tasks.title: REPL test script
tasks.description: A runnable Node.js script (npx tsx scripts/test-repl.ts) that creates an agent, sends a hardcoded question, prints the response, then optionally enters a readline loop for interactive testing.
tasks.complexityReason: Single standalone script; no integration with the app; straightforward readline usage
tasks.verify: Run the script; see a printed response from the agent. Ask a follow-up; context is maintained.

tasks.title: In-memory session store
tasks.description: Export a singleton SessionStore class using Map<string, SessionData>. Methods: createSession, getSession, listSessions, deleteSession, addMessage, getMessages, updateSessionTitle. Uses globalThis pattern to survive Next.js hot-reload.
tasks.complexityReason: Singleton pattern with globalThis, multiple CRUD methods, UUID generation, sorted listing, and session-message relationship management
tasks.verify: Instantiate store; create a session; add a message; retrieve it; delete it. All operations return expected data.

tasks.title: POST /api/chat route
tasks.description: Accept JSON body { message, session_id?, model? }. Validate input (required message, max 10k chars, model in MODEL_LIST). Create/find session, add user message, invoke agent with history, add assistant response, auto-title on first message. Return { session_id, message, model }.
tasks.complexityReason: Complex business logic: input validation, session creation/lookup, agent invocation, auto-titling, error handling for multiple failure modes (400, 404, 429, 500, 502)
tasks.verify: curl -X POST localhost:3000/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"Hello"}' returns JSON with session_id, message, and model

tasks.title: GET /api/sessions route
tasks.description: Return { sessions: Session[] } from the session store, sorted by createdAt descending
tasks.complexityReason: Single route handler that calls one store method and returns the result; no business logic
tasks.verify: curl localhost:3000/api/sessions returns { sessions: [] } initially; after creating sessions via /api/chat, returns populated list

tasks.title: POST /api/sessions route
tasks.description: Create a new empty session in the store. Return { session: Session } with status 201.
tasks.complexityReason: Simple route handler in same file as GET; calls one store method
tasks.verify: curl -X POST localhost:3000/api/sessions returns a new session object with id, title: 'New Chat', createdAt

tasks.title: DELETE /api/sessions/[id] route
tasks.description: Delete the session with the given id from the store. Return { success: true } or 404 if not found.
tasks.complexityReason: Single route handler with simple lookup and delete; minimal error handling
tasks.verify: Create a session, delete it by id, verify GET /api/sessions no longer includes it

tasks.title: GET /api/sessions/[id]/messages route
tasks.description: Return { messages: Message[] } for the given session, ordered by timestamp ascending. Return 404 if session not found.
tasks.complexityReason: Single route handler with session lookup and message retrieval; minimal error handling
tasks.verify: Send a chat message, then curl localhost:3000/api/sessions/{id}/messages returns the user + assistant messages

tasks.title: ChatBubble component
tasks.description: Presentational component accepting role and content. User bubble: right-aligned with primary colors. Assistant bubble: left-aligned with Bot icon avatar and muted colors. Fade-in + slide-up animation on mount (200ms). Use React.memo for performance.
tasks.complexityReason: Single presentational component with conditional styling; no business logic or state
tasks.verify: Render both variants in page.tsx; user bubble is right-aligned with primary colors; assistant bubble is left-aligned with muted colors and avatar icon

tasks.title: TypingIndicator component
tasks.description: Renders three animated dots in an assistant-style bubble layout. Uses CSS @keyframes typing-dot with staggered animation-delay (0ms, 150ms, 300ms). Dots are w-2 h-2 rounded-full, 600ms cycle infinite.
tasks.complexityReason: Single presentational component with CSS animation; no logic or state
tasks.verify: Render the component; three dots bounce with visible stagger; looks like an assistant bubble

tasks.title: ChatInput component
tasks.description: Auto-growing textarea (min 1 row, max 6 rows) with Send button (icon-only). Enter sends and clears; Shift+Enter inserts newline. Send disabled when empty. aria-label on textarea. autoFocus on mount. Manages own inputValue state.
tasks.complexityReason: Internal state management, keyboard event handling (Enter vs Shift+Enter), auto-growing textarea behavior, accessibility attributes, and disabled state logic
tasks.verify: Type text, press Enter -- onSend fires with the text, input clears. Shift+Enter adds a newline. Empty input disables Send button.

tasks.title: SessionSidebar component
tasks.description: Fixed-width left panel (w-[260px]) with New Chat button and ScrollArea with SessionItem list. On mobile (<768px), rendered inside shadcn Sheet (side=left). Desktop: always visible with border-r. Semantic aside role=complementary.
tasks.complexityReason: Dual rendering modes (desktop vs mobile Sheet), multiple props, responsive behavior, composition with SessionItem list and ScrollArea
tasks.verify: Desktop: sidebar renders at 260px with border-right. Mobile: sidebar hidden; toggle opens Sheet overlay. New Chat button calls onNewChat.

tasks.title: SessionItem component
tasks.description: Displays session title (truncated) with MessageSquare icon. Active state: bg-accent. Delete button (Trash2) appears on hover via group-hover. Click fires onSelect; delete click fires onDelete with stopPropagation. Keyboard: Enter triggers onSelect. React.memo for performance.
tasks.complexityReason: Multiple interactive behaviors: click handling with stopPropagation, hover-reveal delete button, keyboard support, active state styling, React.memo
tasks.verify: Render with active and inactive props; active has accent background. Hover reveals delete icon. Click fires correct callback.

tasks.title: ModelSelector component
tasks.description: shadcn Select with outline trigger showing current model name. Items from MODEL_LIST constant. Selected item has checkmark. Props: value, onValueChange. Width w-[200px].
tasks.complexityReason: Simple wrapper around shadcn Select primitive with data from constants; no business logic
tasks.verify: Renders with default model shown. Open dropdown; see all models from MODEL_LIST. Select a different model; onValueChange fires.

tasks.title: ChatHeader component
tasks.description: Sticky header (h-14, sticky top-0, backdrop-blur). Left: sidebar toggle button with PanelLeftClose/PanelLeftOpen icon. Right: ModelSelector. Semantic header role=banner.
tasks.complexityReason: Simple presentational layout component composing existing components; no state or logic
tasks.verify: Header sticks to top on scroll. Toggle button fires onToggleSidebar. Model selector is positioned right.

tasks.title: EmptyState component
tasks.description: Centered flex column with Bot icon (48px), title 'Start a conversation', subtitle, and 2-3 suggested prompt buttons (outline) that call onPromptClick(text).
tasks.complexityReason: Simple presentational component with static content and click callbacks; no state
tasks.verify: Renders centered content. Clicking a suggested prompt fires the callback with the prompt text.

tasks.title: DeleteConfirmDialog component
tasks.description: shadcn AlertDialog with title 'Delete conversation?', description about permanent deletion, Cancel (outline) and Delete (destructive) actions. Props: open, onOpenChange, onConfirm.
tasks.complexityReason: Simple wrapper around shadcn AlertDialog primitive with static text; no business logic
tasks.verify: Open dialog; Cancel closes without action. Delete calls onConfirm and closes.

tasks.title: Chat feature -- useSendMessage hook
tasks.description: Export useSendMessage() hook that calls POST /api/chat with { message, session_id, model }. Returns { sendMessage, isLoading, error }. Uses fetch directly. Manages isLoading and error state. Resets error on each new call.
tasks.complexityReason: API integration hook with state management (loading, error), fetch wrapper pattern, error handling for multiple HTTP status codes
tasks.verify: Call sendMessage('Hello') from a component; network tab shows POST to /api/chat; response data is returned.

tasks.title: Chat feature -- useChat hook
tasks.description: Orchestrates chat experience: manages messages state array, isLoading, error. On send: optimistically appends user message, calls useSendMessage, appends assistant response. On error: shows toast via sonner. Returns sendMessage that resolves with session_id, and setMessages for session switching.
tasks.complexityReason: Complex state orchestration: optimistic updates, composing useSendMessage, error handling with toast, message array management, exposing setMessages for external use
tasks.verify: Use in page.tsx; send a message; user bubble appears immediately; typing indicator shows; assistant bubble appears after response.

tasks.title: Session feature -- useSessions hook
tasks.description: Export useSessions() hook with methods: fetchSessions (GET), createSession (POST), deleteSession (DELETE), fetchMessages (GET messages). Returns sessions state, isLoading, error, and all methods.
tasks.complexityReason: Multiple API endpoints in one hook, state management for session list, CRUD operations with error handling and toast notifications
tasks.verify: Call fetchSessions() from a component; sessions state populates. Create and delete sessions successfully.

tasks.title: Session feature -- useSessionManager hook
tasks.description: Orchestrates session management: tracks activeSessionId, handles createSession (sets active, clears messages), selectSession (sets active, fetches messages), deleteSession (confirm, delete, switch to most recent or null). On app init: fetches sessions, selects most recent.
tasks.complexityReason: Complex orchestration: composes useSessions, manages active state, handles session switching with message loading, deletion with fallback logic, initialization on mount
tasks.verify: Create a session; it becomes active. Switch sessions; messages load. Delete active session; app switches to another or shows empty state.

tasks.title: Feature types
tasks.description: Create feature-specific type files that re-export or extend shared types. Chat types: SendMessageRequest, SendMessageResponse. Session types: SessionsResponse, SessionResponse, MessagesResponse.
tasks.complexityReason: Simple type re-exports and interface definitions; no logic
tasks.verify: Types import cleanly from feature directories.

tasks.title: Main page assembly
tasks.description: Compose the full chat interface in page.tsx. Layout: SessionSidebar (left) + main area (header + message thread + input). Uses useSessionManager for session state and useChat for message state. useMediaQuery for responsive sidebar. Auto-scroll to bottom on new message with IntersectionObserver guard. Semantic structure with aria-live, role=log, role=main.
tasks.complexityReason: Wires all hooks and components together: useChat, useSessionManager, useMediaQuery, selectedModel state, sidebarOpen state, auto-scroll logic with IntersectionObserver, and handleSend flow with session refresh
tasks.verify: Full app renders: sidebar with sessions, header with model selector, chat area with messages or empty state, input bar at bottom. All interactions work end-to-end.

tasks.title: Root layout and providers
tasks.description: Set html lang=en with Inter font via next/font/google. Include Toaster (sonner) for toast notifications. Set metadata title 'Simple Chatbot'. Dark mode support via class-based toggling with suppressHydrationWarning.
tasks.complexityReason: Single file layout configuration; standard Next.js boilerplate with font and toaster setup
tasks.verify: Page has correct lang attribute. Toast notifications render when triggered. Font is Inter.

tasks.title: API wiring and error handling
tasks.description: Ensure all API calls handle: 200 (success), 404 (session not found), 429 (rate limit toast), 500 (server error toast). Network offline detection shows inline banner. Loading states show typing indicator for chat.
tasks.complexityReason: Cross-cutting concern across all feature hooks; requires implementing error handling matrix across multiple files and adding offline detection
tasks.verify: Kill the dev server and try to send a message; error toast appears. Send rapid requests; 429 handling works if OpenRouter rate-limits.

tasks.title: Accessibility implementation
tasks.description: Add skip link 'Skip to chat' at top of page. Ensure all icon-only buttons have aria-label. aria-live=polite on message thread. aria-busy=true while loading. role=log on message container. Focus returns to input after sending. Escape closes overlays. Proper tab order.
tasks.complexityReason: Cross-cutting changes across multiple components; requires skip link, ARIA attributes, focus management, keyboard navigation, and tab order verification
tasks.verify: Navigate entire app with keyboard only. Run axe DevTools or Lighthouse accessibility audit; score >= 90. Screen reader announces new messages.

tasks.title: Animations and micro-interactions
tasks.description: Message fade-in + slide-up (200ms). Typing indicator dot bounce (600ms, staggered). Sidebar slide-in on mobile (300ms via shadcn Sheet). Button hover transitions (150ms). Session active highlight transition. Auto-scroll to bottom with smooth behavior, respecting user scroll position.
tasks.complexityReason: Multiple animation systems (CSS keyframes, transitions, scroll behavior), auto-scroll with user scroll detection requiring IntersectionObserver
tasks.verify: Send a message; bubble fades in smoothly. Typing dots bounce visibly. Mobile sidebar slides in. Scroll up, receive a message; scroll position preserved.

tasks.title: Dark mode
tasks.description: Ensure shadcn Zinc theme dark mode variables work correctly. Default to system preference via prefers-color-scheme. All components use CSS variable-based colors for automatic dark mode support.
tasks.complexityReason: shadcn handles dark mode via CSS variables out of the box; just needs verification and optional system preference detection
tasks.verify: Set system to dark mode; entire app switches to dark theme. All text remains readable; contrast ratios maintained.

tasks.title: useMediaQuery hook
tasks.description: Custom hook that returns boolean for a given media query string. Uses window.matchMedia with change event listener. Handles SSR by defaulting to false. Used to detect mobile (max-width: 768px) for sidebar default state.
tasks.complexityReason: SSR-safe implementation with matchMedia API, event listener cleanup, and hydration considerations
tasks.verify: On desktop, useMediaQuery('(max-width: 768px)') returns false. On mobile viewport, returns true.

tasks.title: Final integration test (manual)
tasks.description: End-to-end manual test covering all user flows: empty state with prompts, send message and receive response, follow-up maintains context, create new session, switch sessions, delete session with confirm dialog, change model, mobile responsive sidebar, keyboard navigation, dark mode.
tasks.complexityReason: Comprehensive manual testing across 10 user flows requiring all features to be wired correctly; debugging and fixing integration issues
tasks.verify: All 10 test scenarios from dev-plan pass: empty state, send message, follow-up, new session, switch session, delete session, change model, mobile responsive, keyboard nav, dark mode.
